title: werauhia haltonii
intro: Werauhia haltonii, also known as a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae, is a type of succulent that is native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Werauhia haltonii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
